name: Biology Research
description: Recent findings in molecular biology, genetics, cell biology, and related biological sciences

papers.title: CRISPR-Cas13 Based mRNA Targeting for Therapeutic Applications
papers.abstract: We demonstrate the efficacy of Cas13 systems in selectively targeting viral mRNA sequences in cultured cells. Our results show >95% knockdown efficiency with minimal off-target effects, suggesting therapeutic potential for viral infections.

papers.title: Novel Protein Folding Patterns in Extremophile Enzymes
papers.abstract: We characterize unique structural features of thermophilic proteins that enable their stability at extreme temperatures. These findings may inform enzyme engineering strategies for industrial applications.

papers.title: Epigenetic Regulation of Stem Cell Differentiation
papers.abstract: This study reveals critical histone modification patterns that govern pluripotency maintenance and differentiation. We identified novel regulatory regions that control lineage commitment in human embryonic stem cells.
